**Source of Truth:** `./deck/docs/RFQ.md`

# MMS Beta - Demo What-If com Design Impressionante

> **PLAN CORRECTION (2025-12-20):** Toolkit Core & Performance Priority
> - Portabilidade do @mms/toolkit é PRÉ-REQUISITO (Fase 1)
> - EntityStore com fork/diff é PRÉ-REQUISITO para What-If (Fase 2)
> - RBush é ESTRUTURAL para Canvas, não polimento (Fase 3)
> - Análise streetscape.gl é TAREFA EXPLÍCITA (Fase 1)

## Resumo Executivo

Criar uma demo de alta fidelidade em `./beta` para o sistema MMS (Mileage Management System) que implementa o cenário "what-if" da RFQ com dados mockados. A demo deve impressionar o cliente com visualização estilo Canvas Semantic Zoom (Google Maps) + simulações interativas de man-hours vs capacidade.

**Fonte da Verdade:** `./deck/docs/RFQ.md`

---

## Arquitetura do Projeto

### Stack Tecnológico

```
./beta/
├── apps/
│   └── demo/                    # Aplicação principal da demo
├── packages/
│   ├── toolkit/                 # ⚠️ PORTADO de ./deck/packages/toolkit
│   │   ├── state-machine/       # Store, Machine, Slices, Hooks, Cache
│   │   ├── helpers/             # Utilitários (create-proxy, date-utils, etc)
│   │   └── schema/              # Validação de tipos
│   ├── entity-store/            # ⚠️ PORTADO + EXTENDIDO com fork/diff
│   │   ├── EntityStore.ts       # TypedArray SoA storage
│   │   ├── SandboxStore.ts      # ⚠️ NOVO: fork/diff para What-If
│   │   └── types.ts             # TaskArrays, TaskCursor, etc
│   ├── spatial/                 # ⚠️ PORTADO - RBush spatial index
│   │   └── RBushSpatialIndex.ts # R-tree para queries O(log n)
│   ├── ui/                      # Design system (tokens, componentes)
│   └── data/                    # Mock data generators
├── CLAUDE.md                    # Harness principal
├── features.json                # Features com status (JSON)
├── claude-progress.txt          # Histórico de sessões
├── init.sh                      # Script de inicialização
└── .claude/
    └── hooks/                   # Hooks do Claude Code
```

### Tecnologias Core

| Camada | Tecnologia | Justificativa |
|--------|------------|---------------|
| Runtime | Bun 1.2+ | Monorepo rápido, scripts nativos |
| Build | Vite 5.x | HMR rápido, ESM nativo |
| Frontend | React 18 | Required para BlueprintJS |
| Visualização | deck.gl 9.x | GPU-accelerated, LOD nativo |
| **State** | **Vanilla Store + useSyncExternalStore** | **Padrão React oficial, zero deps extras** |
| **Entity Data** | **EntityStore + SandboxStore** | **TypedArrays + fork/diff para What-If** |
| **Spatial Index** | **RBush** | **R-tree para 60k+ items** |
| UI Base | BlueprintJS 6 | Enterprise-grade, dark theme |
| Charts | Visx (d3-based) | Gráficos man-hours vs capacity |
| Styling | Tailwind CSS | Utility-first, customizável |

### Padrão de State Management (SEM toolkit customizado)

```typescript
/**
 * Vanilla Store Pattern + useSyncExternalStore
 *
 * - Zero dependencies (apenas React 18+)
 * - Oficial do React (não é biblioteca terceira)
 * - Evita hooks customizados complexos
 * - Performance garantida (subscriptions otimizadas)
 */

// 1. Store vanilla (classe simples)
class ViewportStore {
  private state: ViewportState = { zoom: 1, pan: { x: 0, y: 0 } };
  private listeners = new Set<() => void>();

  getState = () => this.state;

  subscribe = (listener: () => void) => {
    this.listeners.add(listener);
    return () => this.listeners.delete(listener);
  };

  // Actions (métodos que mutam estado)
  setZoom = (zoom: number) => {
    this.state = { ...this.state, zoom };
    this.listeners.forEach(l => l());
  };

  setPan = (pan: { x: number; y: number }) => {
    this.state = { ...this.state, pan };
    this.listeners.forEach(l => l());
  };
}

// 2. Instância singleton
export const viewportStore = new ViewportStore();

// 3. Hook usando useSyncExternalStore (único hook necessário)
export function useViewport() {
  return useSyncExternalStore(
    viewportStore.subscribe,
    viewportStore.getState
  );
}

// 4. Selector para valores específicos (evita re-renders)
export function useZoom() {
  return useSyncExternalStore(
    viewportStore.subscribe,
    () => viewportStore.getState().zoom
  );
}
```

**Vantagens sobre toolkit customizado:**
- Código previsível e debugável
- Sem abstrações complexas (Machine, Slices, Cache)
- Padrão oficial React 18+
- Zero dependências extras
- Fácil de testar

### Inspirações de Design

| Aspecto | Referência | Aplicação |
|---------|------------|-----------|
| **Interação** | AVS/streetscape.gl | Playback temporal, streaming-like |
| **Timeline** | Linear.app milestones | Diamantes, zoom Year/Quarter/Month |
| **Scheduling** | Dime Scheduler | Drag-drop, planning board |
| **Visual** | IntelliJ Islands | Dark theme, espaçamentos generosos |
| **Data Viz** | Kepler.gl | Layers com filtros temporais |

---

## Componentes Críticos

### 1. Vanilla Stores (CRIAR DO ZERO)

**NÃO portar @mms/toolkit** - é complexo demais. Criar stores vanilla simples:

| Store | Responsabilidade | Padrão |
|-------|------------------|--------|
| `ViewportStore` | Zoom, pan, LOD level | Vanilla + useSyncExternalStore |
| `SelectionStore` | Tarefas selecionadas, hover | Vanilla + useSyncExternalStore |
| `SandboxStore` | Mode Live/What-If, fork/diff | Wrapper do EntityStore |
| `UIStore` | Sidebar, panels, modals | Vanilla + useSyncExternalStore |

**Localização:** `./beta/packages/stores/`

```
packages/stores/
├── src/
│   ├── viewport.ts      # ViewportStore
│   ├── selection.ts     # SelectionStore
│   ├── sandbox.ts       # SandboxStore (integra EntityStore)
│   ├── ui.ts            # UIStore
│   ├── utils.ts         # createStore helper
│   └── index.ts
└── package.json         # @mms/stores
```

### 2. EntityStore (PORTAR + EXTENSÃO)
**Origem:** `./deck/apps/canvas/src/entity-store/`

Store de alta performance com TypedArrays (Structure of Arrays):

| Feature | Status | Crítico para |
|---------|--------|--------------|
| TypedArrays (Float32, Uint16, etc) | ✅ Existe | Performance 60fps |
| Cursor-based access | ✅ Existe | Zero GC |
| Bulk load | ✅ Existe | 100k entities |
| **fork()** | ❌ NÃO EXISTE | What-If mode |
| **diff()** | ❌ NÃO EXISTE | Impact analysis |
| **apply()** | ❌ NÃO EXISTE | Commit changes |

**NOVO: SandboxStore** - Wrapper que adiciona:
```typescript
class SandboxStore {
  private baseline: EntityStore;
  private sandbox: EntityStore | null = null;

  fork(): void {
    // Cria cópia shallow dos TypedArrays
    this.sandbox = this.baseline.clone();
  }

  diff(): ChangeSet {
    // Compara sandbox vs baseline
    return computeDiff(this.baseline, this.sandbox);
  }

  apply(): void {
    // Copia sandbox para baseline
    this.baseline = this.sandbox;
    this.sandbox = null;
  }

  discard(): void {
    this.sandbox = null;
  }
}
```

### 3. RBushSpatialIndex (OBRIGATÓRIO)
**Origem:** `./deck/apps/canvas/src/deck/spatial/`

Indexação espacial para queries O(log n):

| Feature | Uso |
|---------|-----|
| `bulkLoad(tasks)` | Construção inicial do R-tree |
| `queryViewport(bounds)` | Retorna IDs visíveis |
| `getVisibleTasks(bounds)` | Retorna tasks para render |

**Sem RBush, o canvas TRAVA com 60k items.**

---

## Fases de Implementação (CORRIGIDAS)

### FASE 0: Harness Setup (CRÍTICO)

**Objetivo:** Criar estrutura de harness que persiste contexto entre sessões.

#### Arquivos do Harness

```
./beta/
├── CLAUDE.md               # Regras do projeto + instruções AI
├── claude-progress.txt     # Histórico: "O que foi feito, próximos passos"
├── features.json           # Features com status (JSON, não MD)
├── init.sh                 # Verifica deps, inicia dev server
└── .claude/
    └── settings.json       # Config do Claude Code
```

#### Tarefas

1. **Criar `./beta/CLAUDE.md`**
   - Copiar estrutura de `./deck/CLAUDE.md`
   - Adaptar para novo projeto (remover referências ao deck existente)
   - Incluir regras: evitar hooks React, usar @mms/toolkit

2. **Criar `./beta/features.json`**
   - Formato JSON com features da demo
   - Incluir: passes, blockedBy, tasks

3. **Criar `./beta/claude-progress.txt`**
   - Template inicial vazio

4. **Criar `./beta/init.sh`**
   ```bash
   #!/bin/bash
   bun --version || (echo "Bun not installed" && exit 1)
   bun install
   echo "✅ Environment ready"
   ```

5. **Configurar Claude Code Hooks**
   - Hook `UserPromptSubmit`: Verificar se progress.txt está atualizado
   - Hook `Stop`: Lembrar de commitar e atualizar harness

---

### FASE 1: Toolkit Core + Streetscape Analysis (FUNDAÇÃO)

**Objetivo:** Portar a engine de state management que permite rodar sem React hooks.

#### 1.1 Portar @mms/toolkit

**Origem:** `./deck/packages/toolkit/`
**Destino:** `./beta/packages/toolkit/`

Arquivos a portar:
```
packages/toolkit/
├── src/
│   ├── state-machine/
│   │   ├── store.ts         # Store.create()
│   │   ├── machine.ts       # Machine.Create()
│   │   ├── slice.ts         # Slices.Create()
│   │   ├── hooks.ts         # useMachine, useSelector
│   │   ├── cache.ts         # Cache invalidation
│   │   ├── context.ts       # Context handler
│   │   ├── helpers.ts       # GLOBAL_APP_SESSION_ID, etc
│   │   └── models/          # Types
│   ├── helpers/
│   │   ├── object-utils.ts
│   │   ├── date-utils.ts
│   │   ├── string-utils.ts
│   │   └── type-utils.ts
│   ├── schema/
│   │   └── schema.ts        # invariantType
│   └── index.ts
└── package.json             # @mms/toolkit
```

#### 1.2 Análise Streetscape.gl (TAREFA EXPLÍCITA)

**Objetivo:** Extrair padrões de UI de controle temporal para o design system.

**Tarefas:**
1. Clonar/analisar https://github.com/uber/streetscape.gl
2. Identificar componentes de PlaybackControl
3. Identificar StreamSettingsPanel patterns
4. Documentar padrões aplicáveis ao TimeScrubber
5. Criar `./beta/docs/STREETSCAPE_PATTERNS.md`

**Output esperado:**
- Lista de componentes a adaptar
- Decisão: usar biblioteca existente ou implementar custom

---

### FASE 2: EntityStore + SandboxStore (PRÉ-REQUISITO WHAT-IF)

**Objetivo:** Portar EntityStore e IMPLEMENTAR fork/diff para What-If.

#### 2.1 Portar EntityStore

**Origem:** `./deck/apps/canvas/src/entity-store/`
**Destino:** `./beta/packages/entity-store/`

Arquivos a portar:
```
packages/entity-store/
├── src/
│   ├── EntityStore.ts       # TypedArray SoA storage
│   ├── types.ts             # TaskArrays, TaskCursor, TaskData
│   └── index.ts
└── package.json             # @mms/entity-store
```

#### 2.2 IMPLEMENTAR SandboxStore (NOVO)

**Arquivo:** `./beta/packages/entity-store/src/SandboxStore.ts`

```typescript
/**
 * SandboxStore - Enables What-If scenarios with fork/diff
 *
 * Architecture:
 * - baseline: EntityStore (read-only during sandbox)
 * - sandbox: EntityStore | null (writable copy)
 *
 * Operations:
 * - fork(): Creates shallow copy of TypedArrays
 * - diff(): Computes ChangeSet between baseline and sandbox
 * - apply(): Commits sandbox to baseline
 * - discard(): Abandons sandbox changes
 */

interface ChangeSet {
  added: number[];      // Indices of new tasks
  removed: number[];    // Indices of deleted tasks
  modified: Array<{
    index: number;
    field: keyof TaskArrays;
    oldValue: number;
    newValue: number;
  }>;
}

class SandboxStore {
  private baseline: EntityStore;
  private sandbox: EntityStore | null = null;

  get isInSandbox(): boolean {
    return this.sandbox !== null;
  }

  get activeStore(): EntityStore {
    return this.sandbox ?? this.baseline;
  }

  fork(): void;
  diff(): ChangeSet;
  apply(): void;
  discard(): void;
}
```

---

### FASE 3: Canvas + Spatial Index (ESTRUTURAL)

**Objetivo:** Canvas deck.gl funcional com indexação espacial para 60k+ items.

#### 3.1 Portar RBushSpatialIndex

**Origem:** `./deck/apps/canvas/src/deck/spatial/`
**Destino:** `./beta/packages/spatial/`

```
packages/spatial/
├── src/
│   ├── RBushSpatialIndex.ts  # R-tree queries
│   ├── types.ts              # ViewportBounds, SpatialItem
│   └── index.ts
└── package.json              # @mms/spatial
```

#### 3.2 Setup Canvas básico

**Destino:** `./beta/apps/demo/src/canvas/`

```
apps/demo/src/canvas/
├── DeckCanvas.tsx           # Wrapper deck.gl
├── layers/
│   ├── MacroLayer.ts        # Heatmap (zoom < 0.5x)
│   ├── MesoLayer.ts         # Blocks (0.5x - 2x)
│   └── MicroLayer.ts        # Details (> 2x)
├── viewport/
│   └── ViewportController.ts # Pan, zoom, LOD
└── index.ts
```

#### 3.3 Integração RBush + deck.gl

```typescript
// DeckCanvas.tsx
const visibleTaskIds = useMemo(() => {
  return spatialIndex.queryViewport(viewportBounds);
}, [viewportBounds]);

const layers = useMemo(() => {
  const tasks = spatialIndex.getTasksByIds(visibleTaskIds);
  return createLODLayers(tasks, zoomLevel);
}, [visibleTaskIds, zoomLevel]);
```

**Sem esta fase, o canvas não funciona com dados reais (60k items).**

---

### FASE 4: Design System + UI (packages/ui)

**Objetivo:** Estabelecer tokens e componentes base com design impressionante.

#### 4.1 Design Tokens (CSS Variables)

```css
/* Cores - Inspirado IntelliJ Islands + Linear */
--bg-canvas: #0f0f0f;        /* Fundo principal (quase preto) */
--bg-panel: #1a1a1a;         /* Painéis */
--bg-elevated: #242424;      /* Cards, dropdowns */
--border-subtle: #2a2a2a;    /* Bordas sutis */
--border-default: #3a3a3a;   /* Bordas padrão */

--text-primary: #ffffff;     /* Texto principal */
--text-secondary: #a0a0a0;   /* Texto secundário */
--text-muted: #666666;       /* Texto mudo */

--accent-primary: #5c7cfa;   /* Azul Linear */
--accent-success: #40c057;   /* Verde */
--accent-warning: #fab005;   /* Amarelo */
--accent-danger: #fa5252;    /* Vermelho */
--accent-sandbox: #be4bdb;   /* Violeta (modo what-if) */

/* Tipografia - Inter */
--font-sans: 'Inter', -apple-system, system-ui, sans-serif;
--font-mono: 'JetBrains Mono', monospace;

/* Espaçamento - Generoso como Islands UI */
--space-xs: 4px;
--space-sm: 8px;
--space-md: 16px;
--space-lg: 24px;
--space-xl: 32px;
--space-2xl: 48px;
```

#### 4.2 Componentes Base

1. **Panel** - Container com borda sutil, padding generoso
2. **TimelineRuler** - Régua temporal com zoom levels
3. **ResourceBar** - Barra de utilização (man-hours)
4. **TrainRow** - Linha de trem no canvas
5. **MilestoneMarker** - Diamante estilo Linear
6. **SandboxToggle** - Toggle Live/What-If

#### 4.3 TimeScrubber (baseado em Streetscape patterns)

Componente de controle temporal inspirado no streetscape.gl:
- PlaybackControl-like slider
- Zoom temporal (Year/Quarter/Month/Week)
- Jump to date
- Sync com deck.gl viewport

---

### FASE 5: What-If Mode (USA SandboxStore)

**Objetivo:** Implementar simulação interativa usando SandboxStore.fork/diff.

#### 5.1 Integração SandboxStore + UI

```typescript
// Fluxo What-If
1. User clicks "Enter What-If Mode"
2. sandboxStore.fork() → cria cópia dos dados
3. User edita tarefas (drag, resize, delete)
4. Cada edição modifica sandboxStore.activeStore
5. UI mostra diff em tempo real: sandboxStore.diff()
6. User clicks "Apply" → sandboxStore.apply()
   OU User clicks "Discard" → sandboxStore.discard()
```

#### 5.2 Painel de Impacto

```
┌─────────────────────────────────────┐
│ 📊 What-If Impact Analysis          │
├─────────────────────────────────────┤
│ Changes: 3 tasks modified           │
│                                     │
│ Man-Hours Impact:                   │
│   Week 12: -45h (was overcapacity)  │
│   Week 14: +30h                     │
│   Week 15: +15h                     │
│                                     │
│ [Apply Changes]  [Discard]          │
└─────────────────────────────────────┘
```

#### 5.3 Gráfico Comparativo (RFQ Page 4)

- Chart estilo RFQ: barras "Sem ajuste" vs "Com ajuste"
- Linha de capacidade máxima
- Usa Visx para renderização

---

### FASE 6: Mock Data + Integration

**Objetivo:** Gerar dados realistas baseados na RFQ.

#### 6.1 Data Layer (packages/data)

Tipos baseados na RFQ:

```typescript
// types.ts
interface Fleet {
  id: string;
  name: 'Kinki Sharyo' | 'Alstom';
  trainCount: number; // 49 ou 79
  baseDepot: string;
}

interface Train {
  id: string;
  fleetId: string;
  currentMileage: number;
  fitnessStatus: 'fit' | 'limited' | 'unfit';
  nextPM: MaintenanceTask;
}

interface MaintenanceTask {
  id: string;
  trainId: string;
  type: 'PM1' | 'PM2' | 'PM3' | 'Overhaul';
  scheduledDate: Date;
  estimatedDuration: number; // hours
  manHoursRequired: number;
  trackId: string;
  status: 'scheduled' | 'in-progress' | 'completed' | 'overdue';
}

interface ResourceCapacity {
  date: Date;
  manHoursAvailable: number;
  manHoursRequired: number;
  tracksAvailable: number;
  tracksRequired: number;
}
```

#### 6.2 Mock Data Generator

- 128 trens (49 Kinki + 79 Alstom)
- 10 anos de tarefas PM (~60k tasks)
- Cenários pré-definidos: "Sem ajuste" vs "Com ajuste"
- Conflitos de capacidade intencionais para demo

---

### FASE 7: Polish Visual

**Objetivo:** Refinamento para apresentação ao cliente.

#### 7.1 Animações
- Transições suaves de zoom (ease-out-expo)
- Fade in/out de elementos
- Hover effects sutis

#### 7.2 Responsividade
- Desktop (1920x1080) prioritário
- Tablet landscape suportado

#### 7.3 Dark Theme Consistente
- Todos os componentes com tema escuro
- Sem elementos brancos brilhantes

#### 7.4 Micro-interações
- Loading states
- Skeleton placeholders
- Toast notifications

---

## Layout da Aplicação

```
┌──────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────┐
│ NAVBAR  [Live ◉] [What-If ○]     [Today]  [Zoom: Month ▼]  [⚙]  │
├──────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────┤
│          │                                                       │
│  SIDEBAR │                  CANVAS (deck.gl)                     │
│          │                                                       │
│  Fleet   │   ┌─────────────────────────────────────────────┐    │
│  Filter  │   │ Timeline Ruler (Year/Quarter/Month)          │    │
│          │   ├─────────────────────────────────────────────┤    │
│  ──────  │   │ Train 001 ▓▓▓░░░▓▓░░▓▓▓▓░░░░░░▓▓▓░░░░░    │    │
│          │   │ Train 002 ░░▓▓▓░░░░▓▓░░░░▓▓▓░░░░░░░░░░    │    │
│  Train   │   │ Train 003 ▓░░░░▓▓▓░░░░░▓▓░░░▓▓▓░░░░░░░    │    │

│          │   └─────────────────────────────────────────────┘    │
│          │                                                       │

│          │                                                       │
└──────────┴───────────────────────────────────────────────────────┘
```

#### Layers deck.gl

1. **HeatmapLayer** (zoom < 0.5x) - Density de tarefas
2. **ScatterplotLayer** (0.5x - 2x) - Blocos de manutenção
3. **TextLayer** (> 2x) - Detalhes de tarefas
4. **PathLayer** - Linhas de dependência
5. **IconLayer** - Milestones (diamantes)

#### Interações

- **Pan**: Arrastar para navegar no tempo
- **Zoom**: Scroll para mudar granularidade (Year → Month → Week)
- **Hover**: Tooltip com detalhes da tarefa
- **Click**: Selecionar tarefa para edição (modo What-If)
- **Drag** (What-If): Mover tarefa para nova data

|------------|--------|---------|-------|
| **@mms/toolkit** | `./deck/packages/toolkit/` | `./beta/packages/toolkit/` | Engine state sem hooks |
| **EntityStore** | `./deck/apps/canvas/src/entity-store/` | `./beta/packages/entity-store/` | TypedArrays performance |
| **RBushSpatialIndex** | `./deck/apps/canvas/src/deck/spatial/` | `./beta/packages/spatial/` | O(log n) queries |

### ESTUDAR E ADAPTAR

| Componente | Origem | Uso |
|------------|--------|-----|
| LOD Layers | `./deck/apps/canvas/src/deck/layers/` | Padrão para Macro/Meso/Micro |
| TimeScrubber POCs | `./deck/apps/canvas/src/stories/time-scrubber/` | Avaliar melhores patterns |
| Style Guide | `./deck/docs/MMS_STYLE_GUIDE.md` | Design tokens base |

### IGNORAR

- Código com alucinações/erros
- Estrutura confusa que não segue RFQ
- Arquivos duplicados ou desatualizados

| Erro Original | Correção | Impacto |
|---------------|----------|---------|
| Toolkit era "copiar machines" | Portar @mms/toolkit INTEIRO (Fase 1) | State sem hooks funciona |
| EntityStore era "só tipos" | Portar + criar SandboxStore (Fase 2) | What-If mode possível |
| RBush era "polimento" | Mover para Fase 3 (Canvas) | 60k items sem travar |
| Streetscape era "inspiração" | Análise explícita (Fase 1) | TimeScrubber bem desenhado |

# MMS Beta - What-If Demo with Impressive Design

> **PLAN CORRECTION (2025-12-20):** Simplified Architecture & Performance Priority
> - NO custom toolkit - use Vanilla Stores + useSyncExternalStore (React 18 official pattern)
> - EntityStore with fork/diff is PREREQUISITE for What-If (Phase 2)
> - RBush is STRUCTURAL for Canvas, not polish (Phase 3)
> - Streetscape.gl analysis is EXPLICIT TASK (Phase 1)

## Executive Summary

Create a high-fidelity demo in `./beta` for MMS (Mileage Management System) implementing the "what-if" scenario from the RFQ with mocked data. The demo must impress the client with Canvas Semantic Zoom visualization (Google Maps style) + interactive man-hours vs capacity simulations.

**Source of Truth:** `./deck/docs/RFQ.md`

---

## Arquitetura do Projeto

### Stack Tecnológico

```
./beta/
├── apps/
│   └── demo/                    # Aplicação principal da demo
├── packages/
│   ├── toolkit/                 # ⚠️ PORTADO de ./deck/packages/toolkit
│   │   ├── state-machine/       # Store, Machine, Slices, Hooks, Cache
│   │   ├── helpers/             # Utilitários (create-proxy, date-utils, etc)
│   │   └── schema/              # Validação de tipos
│   ├── entity-store/            # ⚠️ PORTADO + EXTENDIDO com fork/diff
│   │   ├── EntityStore.ts       # TypedArray SoA storage
│   │   ├── SandboxStore.ts      # ⚠️ NOVO: fork/diff para What-If
│   │   └── types.ts             # TaskArrays, TaskCursor, etc
│   ├── spatial/                 # ⚠️ PORTADO - RBush spatial index

### Tecnologias Core

| Camada | Tecnologia | Justificativa |
|--------|------------|---------------|
| Runtime | Bun 1.2+ | Monorepo rápido, scripts nativos |
| Build | Vite 5.x | HMR rápido, ESM nativo |
| Frontend | React 18 | Required para BlueprintJS |
| Visualização | deck.gl 9.x | GPU-accelerated, LOD nativo |
| **State** | **Vanilla Store + useSyncExternalStore** | **Padrão React oficial, zero deps extras** |
| **Entity Data** | **EntityStore + SandboxStore** | **TypedArrays + fork/diff para What-If** |
| **Spatial Index** | **RBush** | **R-tree para 60k+ items** |
| UI Base | BlueprintJS 6 | Enterprise-grade, dark theme |
| Charts | Visx (d3-based) | Gráficos man-hours vs capacity |
| Styling | Tailwind CSS | Utility-first, customizável |

### Padrão de State Management (SEM toolkit customizado)

```typescript
/**
 * Vanilla Store Pattern + useSyncExternalStore
 *
 * - Zero dependencies (apenas React 18+)
 * - Oficial do React (não é biblioteca terceira)
 * - Evita hooks customizados complexos
 * - Performance garantida (subscriptions otimizadas)
 */

// 1. Store vanilla (classe simples)
class ViewportStore {
  private state: ViewportState = { zoom: 1, pan: { x: 0, y: 0 } };
  private listeners = new Set<() => void>();

  getState = () => this.state;

  subscribe = (listener: () => void) => {
    this.listeners.add(listener);
    return () => this.listeners.delete(listener);
  };

  // Actions (métodos que mutam estado)
  setZoom = (zoom: number) => {
    this.state = { ...this.state, zoom };
    this.listeners.forEach(l => l());
  };

  setPan = (pan: { x: number; y: number }) => {
    this.state = { ...this.state, pan };
    this.listeners.forEach(l => l());
  };
}

// 2. Instância singleton
export const viewportStore = new ViewportStore();

// 3. Hook usando useSyncExternalStore (único hook necessário)
export function useViewport() {
  return useSyncExternalStore(
    viewportStore.subscribe,
    viewportStore.getState
  );
}

// 4. Selector para valores específicos (evita re-renders)
export function useZoom() {
  return useSyncExternalStore(
    viewportStore.subscribe,
    () => viewportStore.getState().zoom
  );
}
```

**Vantagens sobre toolkit customizado:**
- Código previsível e debugável
- Sem abstrações complexas (Machine, Slices, Cache)
- Padrão oficial React 18+
- Zero dependências extras
- Fácil de testar

| **Visual** | IntelliJ Islands | Dark theme, espaçamentos generosos |
| **Data Viz** | Kepler.gl | Layers com filtros temporais |

### 2. EntityStore (PORTAR + EXTENSÃO)
**Origem:** `./deck/apps/canvas/src/entity-store/`

Store de alta performance com TypedArrays (Structure of Arrays):

| Feature | Status | Crítico para |
|---------|--------|--------------|
| TypedArrays (Float32, Uint16, etc) | ✅ Existe | Performance 60fps |
| Cursor-based access | ✅ Existe | Zero GC |
| Bulk load | ✅ Existe | 100k entities |
| **fork()** | ❌ NÃO EXISTE | What-If mode |
| **diff()** | ❌ NÃO EXISTE | Impact analysis |
| **apply()** | ❌ NÃO EXISTE | Commit changes |

**NOVO: SandboxStore** - Wrapper que adiciona:
```typescript
class SandboxStore {
  private baseline: EntityStore;
  private sandbox: EntityStore | null = null;

  fork(): void {
    // Cria cópia shallow dos TypedArrays
    this.sandbox = this.baseline.clone();
  }

  diff(): ChangeSet {
    // Compara sandbox vs baseline
    return computeDiff(this.baseline, this.sandbox);
  }

  apply(): void {
    // Copia sandbox para baseline
    this.baseline = this.sandbox;
    this.sandbox = null;
  }

  discard(): void {
    this.sandbox = null;
  }
}
```

### 3. RBushSpatialIndex (OBRIGATÓRIO)
**Origem:** `./deck/apps/canvas/src/deck/spatial/`

Indexação espacial para queries O(log n):

| Feature | Uso |
|---------|-----|
| `bulkLoad(tasks)` | Construção inicial do R-tree |
| `queryViewport(bounds)` | Retorna IDs visíveis |
| `getVisibleTasks(bounds)` | Retorna tasks para render |

**Sem RBush, o canvas TRAVA com 60k items.**

#### 2.2 IMPLEMENTAR SandboxStore (NOVO)

**Arquivo:** `./beta/packages/entity-store/src/SandboxStore.ts`

```typescript
/**
 * SandboxStore - Enables What-If scenarios with fork/diff
 *
 * Architecture:
 * - baseline: EntityStore (read-only during sandbox)
 * - sandbox: EntityStore | null (writable copy)
 *
 * Operations:
 * - fork(): Creates shallow copy of TypedArrays
 * - diff(): Computes ChangeSet between baseline and sandbox
 * - apply(): Commits sandbox to baseline
 * - discard(): Abandons sandbox changes
 */

interface ChangeSet {
  added: number[];      // Indices of new tasks
  removed: number[];    // Indices of deleted tasks
  modified: Array<{
    index: number;
    field: keyof TaskArrays;
    oldValue: number;
    newValue: number;
  }>;
}

class SandboxStore {
  private baseline: EntityStore;
  private sandbox: EntityStore | null = null;

  get isInSandbox(): boolean {
    return this.sandbox !== null;
  }

  get activeStore(): EntityStore {
    return this.sandbox ?? this.baseline;
  }

  fork(): void;
  diff(): ChangeSet;
  apply(): void;
  discard(): void;
}
```

### FASE 5: What-If Mode (USA SandboxStore)

**Objetivo:** Implementar simulação interativa usando SandboxStore.fork/diff.

#### 5.1 Integração SandboxStore + UI

```typescript
// Fluxo What-If
1. User clicks "Enter What-If Mode"
2. sandboxStore.fork() → cria cópia dos dados
3. User edita tarefas (drag, resize, delete)
4. Cada edição modifica sandboxStore.activeStore
5. UI mostra diff em tempo real: sandboxStore.diff()
6. User clicks "Apply" → sandboxStore.apply()
   OU User clicks "Discard" → sandboxStore.discard()
```

│   Week 15: +15h                     │
│                                     │

```

# MMS Beta - What-If Demo with Impressive Design

> **PLAN CORRECTION (2025-12-20):** Simplified Architecture & Performance Priority
> - NO custom toolkit - use Vanilla Stores + useSyncExternalStore (React 18 official pattern)
> - EntityStore with fork/diff is PREREQUISITE for What-If (Phase 2)
> - RBush is STRUCTURAL for Canvas, not polish (Phase 3)
> - Streetscape.gl analysis is EXPLICIT TASK (Phase 1)

## Executive Summary

Create a high-fidelity demo in `./beta` for MMS (Mileage Management System) implementing the "what-if" scenario from the RFQ with mocked data. The demo must impress the client with Canvas Semantic Zoom visualization (Google Maps style) + interactive man-hours vs capacity simulations.

**Source of Truth:** `./deck/docs/RFQ.md`

---

## Project Architecture

### Tech Stack

```
./beta/
├── apps/
│   └── demo/                    # Main demo application
├── packages/
│   ├── stores/                  # ✅ NEW: Vanilla stores + useSyncExternalStore
│   │   ├── viewport.ts          # Zoom, pan, LOD state
│   │   ├── selection.ts         # Hover, selected tasks
│   │   ├── sandbox.ts           # What-If mode state
│   │   └── ui.ts                # Panels, modals state
│   ├── entity-store/            # ⚠️ PORTED + EXTENDED with fork/diff
│   │   ├── EntityStore.ts       # TypedArray SoA storage
│   │   ├── SandboxStore.ts      # ⚠️ NEW: fork/diff for What-If
│   │   └── types.ts             # TaskArrays, TaskCursor, etc
│   ├── spatial/                 # ⚠️ PORTED - RBush spatial index
│   │   └── RBushSpatialIndex.ts # R-tree for O(log n) queries
│   ├── ui/                      # Design system (tokens, components)
│   └── data/                    # Mock data generators
├── CLAUDE.md                    # Main harness
├── features.json                # Features with status (JSON)
├── claude-progress.txt          # Session history
├── init.sh                      # Init script
└── .claude/
    └── hooks/                   # Claude Code hooks
```

### Tecnologias Core

| Camada | Tecnologia | Justificativa |
|--------|------------|---------------|
| Runtime | Bun 1.2+ | Monorepo rápido, scripts nativos |
| Build | Vite 5.x | HMR rápido, ESM nativo |
| Frontend | React 18 | Required para BlueprintJS |
| Visualização | deck.gl 9.x | GPU-accelerated, LOD nativo |
| **State** | **Vanilla Store + useSyncExternalStore** | **Padrão React oficial, zero deps extras** |
| **Entity Data** | **EntityStore + SandboxStore** | **TypedArrays + fork/diff para What-If** |
| **Spatial Index** | **RBush** | **R-tree para 60k+ items** |
| UI Base | BlueprintJS 6 | Enterprise-grade, dark theme |
| Charts | Visx (d3-based) | Gráficos man-hours vs capacity |
| Styling | Tailwind CSS | Utility-first, customizável |

### Padrão de State Management (SEM toolkit customizado)

```typescript
/**
 * Vanilla Store Pattern + useSyncExternalStore
 *
 * - Zero dependencies (apenas React 18+)
 * - Oficial do React (não é biblioteca terceira)
 * - Evita hooks customizados complexos
 * - Performance garantida (subscriptions otimizadas)
 */

// 1. Store vanilla (classe simples)
class ViewportStore {
  private state: ViewportState = { zoom: 1, pan: { x: 0, y: 0 } };
  private listeners = new Set<() => void>();

  getState = () => this.state;

  subscribe = (listener: () => void) => {
    this.listeners.add(listener);
    return () => this.listeners.delete(listener);
  };

  // Actions (métodos que mutam estado)
  setZoom = (zoom: number) => {
    this.state = { ...this.state, zoom };
    this.listeners.forEach(l => l());
  };

  setPan = (pan: { x: number; y: number }) => {
    this.state = { ...this.state, pan };
    this.listeners.forEach(l => l());
  };
}

// 2. Instância singleton
export const viewportStore = new ViewportStore();

// 3. Hook usando useSyncExternalStore (único hook necessário)
export function useViewport() {
  return useSyncExternalStore(
    viewportStore.subscribe,
    viewportStore.getState
  );
}

// 4. Selector para valores específicos (evita re-renders)
export function useZoom() {
  return useSyncExternalStore(
    viewportStore.subscribe,
    () => viewportStore.getState().zoom
  );
}
```

**Vantagens sobre toolkit customizado:**
- Código previsível e debugável
- Sem abstrações complexas (Machine, Slices, Cache)
- Padrão oficial React 18+
- Zero dependências extras
- Fácil de testar

### Inspirações de Design

| Aspecto | Referência | Aplicação |
|---------|------------|-----------|
| **Interação** | AVS/streetscape.gl | Playback temporal, streaming-like |
| **Timeline** | Linear.app milestones | Diamantes, zoom Year/Quarter/Month |
| **Scheduling** | Dime Scheduler | Drag-drop, planning board |
| **Visual** | IntelliJ Islands | Dark theme, espaçamentos generosos |
| **Data Viz** | Kepler.gl | Layers com filtros temporais |

---

## Componentes Críticos

### 1. Vanilla Stores (CRIAR DO ZERO)

**NÃO portar @mms/toolkit** - é complexo demais. Criar stores vanilla simples:

| Store | Responsabilidade | Padrão |
|-------|------------------|--------|
| `ViewportStore` | Zoom, pan, LOD level | Vanilla + useSyncExternalStore |
| `SelectionStore` | Tarefas selecionadas, hover | Vanilla + useSyncExternalStore |
| `SandboxStore` | Mode Live/What-If, fork/diff | Wrapper do EntityStore |
| `UIStore` | Sidebar, panels, modals | Vanilla + useSyncExternalStore |

**Localização:** `./beta/packages/stores/`

```
packages/stores/
├── src/
│   ├── viewport.ts      # ViewportStore
│   ├── selection.ts     # SelectionStore
│   ├── sandbox.ts       # SandboxStore (integra EntityStore)
│   ├── ui.ts            # UIStore
│   ├── utils.ts         # createStore helper
│   └── index.ts
└── package.json         # @mms/stores
```

### 2. EntityStore (PORTAR + EXTENSÃO)
**Origem:** `./deck/apps/canvas/src/entity-store/`

Store de alta performance com TypedArrays (Structure of Arrays):

| Feature | Status | Crítico para |
|---------|--------|--------------|
| TypedArrays (Float32, Uint16, etc) | ✅ Existe | Performance 60fps |
| Cursor-based access | ✅ Existe | Zero GC |
| Bulk load | ✅ Existe | 100k entities |
| **fork()** | ❌ NÃO EXISTE | What-If mode |
| **diff()** | ❌ NÃO EXISTE | Impact analysis |
| **apply()** | ❌ NÃO EXISTE | Commit changes |

**NOVO: SandboxStore** - Wrapper que adiciona:
```typescript
class SandboxStore {
  private baseline: EntityStore;
  private sandbox: EntityStore | null = null;

  fork(): void {
    // Cria cópia shallow dos TypedArrays
    this.sandbox = this.baseline.clone();
  }

  diff(): ChangeSet {
    // Compara sandbox vs baseline
    return computeDiff(this.baseline, this.sandbox);
  }

  apply(): void {
    // Copia sandbox para baseline
    this.baseline = this.sandbox;
    this.sandbox = null;
  }

  discard(): void {
    this.sandbox = null;
  }
}
```

### 3. RBushSpatialIndex (OBRIGATÓRIO)
**Origem:** `./deck/apps/canvas/src/deck/spatial/`

Indexação espacial para queries O(log n):

| Feature | Uso |
|---------|-----|
| `bulkLoad(tasks)` | Construção inicial do R-tree |
| `queryViewport(bounds)` | Retorna IDs visíveis |
| `getVisibleTasks(bounds)` | Retorna tasks para render |

**Sem RBush, o canvas TRAVA com 60k items.**

---

## Fases de Implementação (CORRIGIDAS)

### FASE 0: Harness Setup (CRÍTICO)

**Objetivo:** Criar estrutura de harness que persiste contexto entre sessões.

#### Arquivos do Harness

```
./beta/
├── CLAUDE.md               # Regras do projeto + instruções AI
├── claude-progress.txt     # Histórico: "O que foi feito, próximos passos"
├── features.json           # Features com status (JSON, não MD)
├── init.sh                 # Verifica deps, inicia dev server
└── .claude/
    └── settings.json       # Config do Claude Code
```

#### Tarefas

1. **Criar `./beta/CLAUDE.md`**
   - Copiar estrutura de `./deck/CLAUDE.md`
   - Adaptar para novo projeto (remover referências ao deck existente)
   - Incluir regras: evitar hooks React, usar @mms/toolkit

2. **Criar `./beta/features.json`**
   - Formato JSON com features da demo
   - Incluir: passes, blockedBy, tasks

3. **Criar `./beta/claude-progress.txt`**
   - Template inicial vazio

4. **Criar `./beta/init.sh`**
   ```bash
   #!/bin/bash
   bun --version || (echo "Bun not installed" && exit 1)
   bun install
   echo "✅ Environment ready"
   ```

5. **Configurar Claude Code Hooks**
   - Hook `UserPromptSubmit`: Verificar se progress.txt está atualizado
   - Hook `Stop`: Lembrar de commitar e atualizar harness

---

### FASE 1: Toolkit Core + Streetscape Analysis (FUNDAÇÃO)

**Objetivo:** Portar a engine de state management que permite rodar sem React hooks.

#### 1.1 Portar @mms/toolkit

**Origem:** `./deck/packages/toolkit/`
**Destino:** `./beta/packages/toolkit/`

Arquivos a portar:
```
packages/toolkit/
├── src/
│   ├── state-machine/
│   │   ├── store.ts         # Store.create()
│   │   ├── machine.ts       # Machine.Create()
│   │   ├── slice.ts         # Slices.Create()
│   │   ├── hooks.ts         # useMachine, useSelector
│   │   ├── cache.ts         # Cache invalidation
│   │   ├── context.ts       # Context handler
│   │   ├── helpers.ts       # GLOBAL_APP_SESSION_ID, etc
│   │   └── models/          # Types
│   ├── helpers/
│   │   ├── object-utils.ts
│   │   ├── date-utils.ts
│   │   ├── string-utils.ts
│   │   └── type-utils.ts
│   ├── schema/
│   │   └── schema.ts        # invariantType
│   └── index.ts
└── package.json             # @mms/toolkit
```

#### 1.2 Análise Streetscape.gl (TAREFA EXPLÍCITA)

**Objetivo:** Extrair padrões de UI de controle temporal para o design system.

**Tarefas:**
1. Clonar/analisar https://github.com/uber/streetscape.gl
2. Identificar componentes de PlaybackControl
3. Identificar StreamSettingsPanel patterns
4. Documentar padrões aplicáveis ao TimeScrubber
5. Criar `./beta/docs/STREETSCAPE_PATTERNS.md`

**Output esperado:**
- Lista de componentes a adaptar
- Decisão: usar biblioteca existente ou implementar custom

---

### FASE 2: EntityStore + SandboxStore (PRÉ-REQUISITO WHAT-IF)

**Objetivo:** Portar EntityStore e IMPLEMENTAR fork/diff para What-If.

#### 2.1 Portar EntityStore

**Origem:** `./deck/apps/canvas/src/entity-store/`
**Destino:** `./beta/packages/entity-store/`

Arquivos a portar:
```
packages/entity-store/
├── src/
│   ├── EntityStore.ts       # TypedArray SoA storage
│   ├── types.ts             # TaskArrays, TaskCursor, TaskData
│   └── index.ts
└── package.json             # @mms/entity-store
```

#### 2.2 IMPLEMENTAR SandboxStore (NOVO)

**Arquivo:** `./beta/packages/entity-store/src/SandboxStore.ts`

```typescript
/**
 * SandboxStore - Enables What-If scenarios with fork/diff
 *
 * Architecture:
 * - baseline: EntityStore (read-only during sandbox)
 * - sandbox: EntityStore | null (writable copy)
 *
 * Operations:
 * - fork(): Creates shallow copy of TypedArrays
 * - diff(): Computes ChangeSet between baseline and sandbox
 * - apply(): Commits sandbox to baseline
 * - discard(): Abandons sandbox changes
 */

interface ChangeSet {
  added: number[];      // Indices of new tasks
  removed: number[];    // Indices of deleted tasks
  modified: Array<{
    index: number;
    field: keyof TaskArrays;
    oldValue: number;
    newValue: number;
  }>;
}

class SandboxStore {
  private baseline: EntityStore;
  private sandbox: EntityStore | null = null;

  get isInSandbox(): boolean {
    return this.sandbox !== null;
  }

  get activeStore(): EntityStore {
    return this.sandbox ?? this.baseline;
  }

  fork(): void;
  diff(): ChangeSet;
  apply(): void;
  discard(): void;
}
```

### FASE 3: Canvas + Spatial Index (ESTRUTURAL)

**Objetivo:** Canvas deck.gl funcional com indexação espacial para 60k+ items.

#### 3.1 Portar RBushSpatialIndex

**Origem:** `./deck/apps/canvas/src/deck/spatial/`
**Destino:** `./beta/packages/spatial/`

```
packages/spatial/
├── src/
│   ├── RBushSpatialIndex.ts  # R-tree queries
│   ├── types.ts              # ViewportBounds, SpatialItem
│   └── index.ts
└── package.json              # @mms/spatial
```

#### 3.2 Setup Canvas básico

**Destino:** `./beta/apps/demo/src/canvas/`

```
apps/demo/src/canvas/
├── DeckCanvas.tsx           # Wrapper deck.gl
├── layers/
│   ├── MacroLayer.ts        # Heatmap (zoom < 0.5x)
│   ├── MesoLayer.ts         # Blocks (0.5x - 2x)
│   └── MicroLayer.ts        # Details (> 2x)
├── viewport/
│   └── ViewportController.ts # Pan, zoom, LOD
└── index.ts
```

#### 3.3 Integração RBush + deck.gl

```typescript
// DeckCanvas.tsx
const visibleTaskIds = useMemo(() => {
  return spatialIndex.queryViewport(viewportBounds);
}, [viewportBounds]);

const layers = useMemo(() => {
  const tasks = spatialIndex.getTasksByIds(visibleTaskIds);
  return createLODLayers(tasks, zoomLevel);
}, [visibleTaskIds, zoomLevel]);
```

**Sem esta fase, o canvas não funciona com dados reais (60k items).**

### FASE 5: What-If Mode (USA SandboxStore)

**Objetivo:** Implementar simulação interativa usando SandboxStore.fork/diff.

#### 5.1 Integração SandboxStore + UI

```typescript
// Fluxo What-If
1. User clicks "Enter What-If Mode"
2. sandboxStore.fork() → cria cópia dos dados
3. User edita tarefas (drag, resize, delete)
4. Cada edição modifica sandboxStore.activeStore
5. UI mostra diff em tempo real: sandboxStore.diff()
6. User clicks "Apply" → sandboxStore.apply()
   OU User clicks "Discard" → sandboxStore.discard()
```

#### 5.2 Painel de Impacto

```
┌─────────────────────────────────────┐

│                                     │
│ Man-Hours Impact:                   │
│   Week 12: -45h (was overcapacity)  │
│   Week 14: +30h                     │
│   Week 15: +15h                     │
│                                     │
│ [Apply Changes]  [Discard]          │
└─────────────────────────────────────┘
```

#### Layers deck.gl

1. **HeatmapLayer** (zoom < 0.5x) - Density de tarefas
2. **ScatterplotLayer** (0.5x - 2x) - Blocos de manutenção
3. **TextLayer** (> 2x) - Detalhes de tarefas
4. **PathLayer** - Linhas de dependência
5. **IconLayer** - Milestones (diamantes)

#### Interações

- **Pan**: Arrastar para navegar no tempo
- **Zoom**: Scroll para mudar granularidade (Year → Month → Week)
- **Hover**: Tooltip com detalhes da tarefa
- **Click**: Selecionar tarefa para edição (modo What-If)
- **Drag** (What-If): Mover tarefa para nova data

| Store | Responsibility | Pattern |

toolUseResult.originalFile:
# MMS Beta - What-If Demo with Impressive Design

> **PLAN CORRECTION (2025-12-20):** Simplified Architecture & Performance Priority
> - NO custom toolkit - use Vanilla Stores + useSyncExternalStore (React 18 official pattern)
> - EntityStore with fork/diff is PREREQUISITE for What-If (Phase 2)
> - RBush is STRUCTURAL for Canvas, not polish (Phase 3)
> - Streetscape.gl analysis is EXPLICIT TASK (Phase 1)

## Executive Summary

Create a high-fidelity demo in `./beta` for MMS (Mileage Management System) implementing the "what-if" scenario from the RFQ with mocked data. The demo must impress the client with Canvas Semantic Zoom visualization (Google Maps style) + interactive man-hours vs capacity simulations.

**Source of Truth:** `./deck/docs/RFQ.md`

---

## Project Architecture

### Tech Stack

```
./beta/
├── apps/
│   └── demo/                    # Main demo application
├── packages/
│   ├── stores/                  # ✅ NEW: Vanilla stores + useSyncExternalStore
│   │   ├── viewport.ts          # Zoom, pan, LOD state
│   │   ├── selection.ts         # Hover, selected tasks
│   │   ├── sandbox.ts           # What-If mode state
│   │   └── ui.ts                # Panels, modals state
│   ├── entity-store/            # ⚠️ PORTED + EXTENDED with fork/diff
│   │   ├── EntityStore.ts       # TypedArray SoA storage
│   │   ├── SandboxStore.ts      # ⚠️ NEW: fork/diff for What-If
│   │   └── types.ts             # TaskArrays, TaskCursor, etc
│   ├── spatial/                 # ⚠️ PORTED - RBush spatial index
│   │   └── RBushSpatialIndex.ts # R-tree for O(log n) queries
│   ├── ui/                      # Design system (tokens, components)
│   └── data/                    # Mock data generators
├── CLAUDE.md                    # Main harness
├── features.json                # Features with status (JSON)
├── claude-progress.txt          # Session history
├── init.sh                      # Init script
└── .claude/
    └── hooks/                   # Claude Code hooks
```

### Core Technologies

| Layer | Technology | Justification |
|-------|------------|---------------|
| Runtime | Bun 1.2+ | Fast monorepo, native scripts |
| Build | Vite 5.x | Fast HMR, native ESM |
| Frontend | React 18 | Required for BlueprintJS |
| Visualization | deck.gl 9.x | GPU-accelerated, native LOD |
| **State** | **Vanilla Store + useSyncExternalStore** | **Official React pattern, zero extra deps** |
| **Entity Data** | **EntityStore + SandboxStore** | **TypedArrays + fork/diff for What-If** |
| **Spatial Index** | **RBush** | **R-tree for 60k+ items** |
| UI Base | BlueprintJS 6 | Enterprise-grade, dark theme |
| Charts | Visx (d3-based) | Man-hours vs capacity charts |
| Styling | Tailwind CSS | Utility-first, customizable |

### State Management Pattern (NO custom toolkit)

```typescript
/**
 * Vanilla Store Pattern + useSyncExternalStore
 *
 * - Zero dependencies (React 18+ only)
 * - Official React pattern (not third-party library)
 * - Avoids complex custom hooks
 * - Guaranteed performance (optimized subscriptions)
 */

// 1. Vanilla store (simple class)
class ViewportStore {
  private state: ViewportState = { zoom: 1, pan: { x: 0, y: 0 } };
  private listeners = new Set<() => void>();

  getState = () => this.state;

  subscribe = (listener: () => void) => {
    this.listeners.add(listener);
    return () => this.listeners.delete(listener);
  };

  // Actions (methods that mutate state)
  setZoom = (zoom: number) => {
    this.state = { ...this.state, zoom };
    this.listeners.forEach(l => l());
  };

  setPan = (pan: { x: number; y: number }) => {
    this.state = { ...this.state, pan };
    this.listeners.forEach(l => l());
  };
}

// 2. Singleton instance
export const viewportStore = new ViewportStore();

// 3. Hook using useSyncExternalStore (only hook needed)
export function useViewport() {
  return useSyncExternalStore(
    viewportStore.subscribe,
    viewportStore.getState
  );
}

// 4. Selector for specific values (avoids re-renders)
export function useZoom() {
  return useSyncExternalStore(
    viewportStore.subscribe,
    () => viewportStore.getState().zoom
  );
}
```

**Advantages over custom toolkit:**
- Predictable and debuggable code
- No complex abstractions (Machine, Slices, Cache)
- Official React 18+ pattern
- Zero extra dependencies
- Easy to test

### Design Inspirations

| Aspect | Reference | Application |
|--------|-----------|-------------|
| **Interaction** | AVS/streetscape.gl | Temporal playback, streaming-like |
| **Timeline** | Linear.app milestones | Diamonds, zoom Year/Quarter/Month |
| **Scheduling** | Dime Scheduler | Drag-drop, planning board |
| **Visual** | IntelliJ Islands | Dark theme, generous spacing |
| **Data Viz** | Kepler.gl | Layers with temporal filters |

---

## Componentes Críticos

### 1. Vanilla Stores (CRIAR DO ZERO)

**NÃO portar @mms/toolkit** - é complexo demais. Criar stores vanilla simples:

| Store | Responsabilidade | Padrão |
|-------|------------------|--------|
| `ViewportStore` | Zoom, pan, LOD level | Vanilla + useSyncExternalStore |
| `SelectionStore` | Tarefas selecionadas, hover | Vanilla + useSyncExternalStore |
| `SandboxStore` | Mode Live/What-If, fork/diff | Wrapper do EntityStore |
| `UIStore` | Sidebar, panels, modals | Vanilla + useSyncExternalStore |

**Localização:** `./beta/packages/stores/`

```
packages/stores/
├── src/
│   ├── viewport.ts      # ViewportStore
│   ├── selection.ts     # SelectionStore
│   ├── sandbox.ts       # SandboxStore (integra EntityStore)
│   ├── ui.ts            # UIStore
│   ├── utils.ts         # createStore helper
│   └── index.ts
└── package.json         # @mms/stores
```

### 2. EntityStore (PORTAR + EXTENSÃO)
**Origem:** `./deck/apps/canvas/src/entity-store/`

Store de alta performance com TypedArrays (Structure of Arrays):

| Feature | Status | Crítico para |
|---------|--------|--------------|
| TypedArrays (Float32, Uint16, etc) | ✅ Existe | Performance 60fps |
| Cursor-based access | ✅ Existe | Zero GC |
| Bulk load | ✅ Existe | 100k entities |
| **fork()** | ❌ NÃO EXISTE | What-If mode |
| **diff()** | ❌ NÃO EXISTE | Impact analysis |
| **apply()** | ❌ NÃO EXISTE | Commit changes |

**NOVO: SandboxStore** - Wrapper que adiciona:
```typescript
class SandboxStore {
  private baseline: EntityStore;
  private sandbox: EntityStore | null = null;

  fork(): void {
    // Cria cópia shallow dos TypedArrays
    this.sandbox = this.baseline.clone();
  }

  diff(): ChangeSet {
    // Compara sandbox vs baseline
    return computeDiff(this.baseline, this.sandbox);
  }

  apply(): void {
    // Copia sandbox para baseline
    this.baseline = this.sandbox;
    this.sandbox = null;
  }

  discard(): void {
    this.sandbox = null;
  }
}
```

### 3. RBushSpatialIndex (OBRIGATÓRIO)
**Origem:** `./deck/apps/canvas/src/deck/spatial/`

Indexação espacial para queries O(log n):

| Feature | Uso |
|---------|-----|
| `bulkLoad(tasks)` | Construção inicial do R-tree |
| `queryViewport(bounds)` | Retorna IDs visíveis |
| `getVisibleTasks(bounds)` | Retorna tasks para render |

**Sem RBush, o canvas TRAVA com 60k items.**

#### 2.2 IMPLEMENTAR SandboxStore (NOVO)

**Arquivo:** `./beta/packages/entity-store/src/SandboxStore.ts`

```typescript
/**
 * SandboxStore - Enables What-If scenarios with fork/diff
 *
 * Architecture:
 * - baseline: EntityStore (read-only during sandbox)
 * - sandbox: EntityStore | null (writable copy)
 *
 * Operations:
 * - fork(): Creates shallow copy of TypedArrays
 * - diff(): Computes ChangeSet between baseline and sandbox
 * - apply(): Commits sandbox to baseline
 * - discard(): Abandons sandbox changes
 */

interface ChangeSet {
  added: number[];      // Indices of new tasks
  removed: number[];    // Indices of deleted tasks
  modified: Array<{
    index: number;
    field: keyof TaskArrays;
    oldValue: number;
    newValue: number;
  }>;
}

class SandboxStore {
  private baseline: EntityStore;
  private sandbox: EntityStore | null = null;

  get isInSandbox(): boolean {
    return this.sandbox !== null;
  }

  get activeStore(): EntityStore {
    return this.sandbox ?? this.baseline;
  }

  fork(): void;
  diff(): ChangeSet;
  apply(): void;
  discard(): void;
}
```

// DeckCanvas.tsx
const visibleTaskIds = useMemo(() => {
  return spatialIndex.queryViewport(viewportBounds);
}, [viewportBounds]);

const layers = useMemo(() => {
  const tasks = spatialIndex.getTasksByIds(visibleTaskIds);
  return createLODLayers(tasks, zoomLevel);
}, [visibleTaskIds, zoomLevel]);

### FASE 5: What-If Mode (USA SandboxStore)

```typescript
// Fluxo What-If
1. User clicks "Enter What-If Mode"
2. sandboxStore.fork() → cria cópia dos dados
3. User edita tarefas (drag, resize, delete)
4. Cada edição modifica sandboxStore.activeStore
5. UI mostra diff em tempo real: sandboxStore.diff()
6. User clicks "Apply" → sandboxStore.apply()
   OU User clicks "Discard" → sandboxStore.discard()
```

│   Week 12: -45h (was overcapacity)  │
│   Week 14: +30h                     │
│   Week 15: +15h                     │
│                                     │
│ [Apply Changes]  [Discard]          │
└─────────────────────────────────────┘
```

#### Layers deck.gl

1. **HeatmapLayer** (zoom < 0.5x) - Density de tarefas
2. **ScatterplotLayer** (0.5x - 2x) - Blocos de manutenção
3. **TextLayer** (> 2x) - Detalhes de tarefas
4. **PathLayer** - Linhas de dependência
5. **IconLayer** - Milestones (diamantes)

#### Interações

- **Pan**: Arrastar para navegar no tempo
- **Zoom**: Scroll para mudar granularidade (Year → Month → Week)
- **Hover**: Tooltip com detalhes da tarefa
- **Click**: Selecionar tarefa para edição (modo What-If)
- **Drag** (What-If): Mover tarefa para nova data

# MMS Beta - What-If Demo

**Source of Truth:** `./deck/docs/RFQ.md`

Create a high-fidelity demo in `./beta` implementing the "what-if" scenario from the RFQ with mocked data. Canvas Semantic Zoom (Google Maps style) + interactive man-hours vs capacity simulations.

---

## Project Structure

```
./beta/
├── apps/
│   └── demo/                    # Main demo application
├── packages/
│   ├── stores/                  # Vanilla stores + useSyncExternalStore
│   ├── entity-store/            # TypedArray SoA storage + fork/diff
│   ├── spatial/                 # RBush spatial index
│   ├── ui/                      # Design system
│   └── data/                    # Mock data generators
├── docs/
│   └── STREETSCAPE_PATTERNS.md  # TimeScrubber patterns analysis
├── CLAUDE.md                    # Harness
├── features.json                # Feature tracking
├── claude-progress.txt          # Session history
└── init.sh                      # Init script
```

---

## Tech Stack

| Layer | Technology | Justification |
|-------|------------|---------------|
| Runtime | Bun 1.2+ | Fast monorepo |
| Build | Vite 5.x | Fast HMR |
| Frontend | React 18 | Required for BlueprintJS |
| Visualization | deck.gl 9.x | GPU-accelerated, LOD |
| State | Vanilla Store + useSyncExternalStore | Official React 18 pattern |
| Entity Data | EntityStore + SandboxStore | TypedArrays + fork/diff |
| Spatial Index | RBush | R-tree for 60k+ items |
| UI | BlueprintJS 6 | Enterprise dark theme |
| Charts | Visx | d3-based charts |
| Styling | Tailwind CSS | Utility-first |

---

## Design Inspirations

| Aspect | Reference |
|--------|-----------|
| Interaction | AVS/streetscape.gl |
| Timeline | Linear.app milestones |
| Scheduling | Dime Scheduler |
| Visual | IntelliJ Islands |

---

## Implementation Phases

### Phase 0: Harness Setup

Create harness structure for context persistence.

**Files:**
- `./beta/CLAUDE.md`
- `./beta/features.json`
- `./beta/claude-progress.txt`
- `./beta/init.sh`
- `./beta/.claude/settings.json`

---

### Phase 1: Stores + Streetscape Analysis

#### 1.1 Vanilla Stores (`packages/stores/`)

```typescript
// Pattern: Vanilla class + useSyncExternalStore
class ViewportStore {
  private state = { zoom: 1, pan: { x: 0, y: 0 } };
  private listeners = new Set<() => void>();

  getState = () => this.state;
  subscribe = (l: () => void) => { this.listeners.add(l); return () => this.listeners.delete(l); };

  setZoom = (zoom: number) => { this.state = { ...this.state, zoom }; this.listeners.forEach(l => l()); };
}

export const viewportStore = new ViewportStore();
export const useViewport = () => useSyncExternalStore(viewportStore.subscribe, viewportStore.getState);
```

**Stores to create:**
- `viewport.ts` - Zoom, pan, LOD
- `selection.ts` - Hover, selected tasks
- `sandbox.ts` - Live/What-If mode
- `ui.ts` - Panels, modals

#### 1.2 Streetscape.gl Analysis

Analyze https://github.com/uber/streetscape.gl for:
- PlaybackControl patterns
- StreamSettingsPanel patterns
- Document in `docs/STREETSCAPE_PATTERNS.md`

---

### Phase 2: EntityStore + SandboxStore

#### 2.1 Port EntityStore (`packages/entity-store/`)

**From:** `./deck/apps/canvas/src/entity-store/`

- `EntityStore.ts` - TypedArray SoA storage
- `types.ts` - TaskArrays, TaskCursor

#### 2.2 Create SandboxStore (NEW)

```typescript
interface ChangeSet {
  added: number[];
  removed: number[];
  modified: Array<{ index: number; field: string; oldValue: number; newValue: number; }>;
}

class SandboxStore {
  private baseline: EntityStore;
  private sandbox: EntityStore | null = null;

  get isInSandbox() { return this.sandbox !== null; }
  get activeStore() { return this.sandbox ?? this.baseline; }

  fork(): void;      // Create shallow copy
  diff(): ChangeSet; // Compute changes
  apply(): void;     // Commit changes
  discard(): void;   // Abandon changes
}
```

---

### Phase 3: Spatial Index + Canvas

#### 3.1 Port RBushSpatialIndex (`packages/spatial/`)

**From:** `./deck/apps/canvas/src/deck/spatial/`

- `RBushSpatialIndex.ts` - R-tree queries
- `types.ts` - ViewportBounds, SpatialItem

#### 3.2 Canvas Setup (`apps/demo/src/canvas/`)

- `DeckCanvas.tsx` - deck.gl wrapper
- `layers/MacroLayer.ts` - Heatmap (zoom < 0.5x)
- `layers/MesoLayer.ts` - Blocks (0.5x - 2x)
- `layers/MicroLayer.ts` - Details (> 2x)

---

### Phase 4: Design System + UI

#### 4.1 Design Tokens (`packages/ui/`)

```css

```

#### 4.2 Components

- Panel, TimelineRuler, ResourceBar, SandboxToggle

#### 4.3 TimeScrubber

Based on Streetscape.gl analysis from Phase 1.

---

### Phase 5: What-If Mode

#### 5.1 Flow

```
1. User clicks "Enter What-If Mode"
2. sandboxStore.fork()
3. User edits tasks (drag, resize)
4. UI shows diff in real-time
5. User clicks "Apply" → sandboxStore.apply()
   OR "Discard" → sandboxStore.discard()
```

#### 5.2 Components

- `SandboxToggle.tsx` - Live/What-If toggle
- `ImpactPanel.tsx` - Show diff, Apply/Discard buttons
- `ComparisonChart.tsx` - Man-hours vs capacity (RFQ Page 4 style)

---

### Phase 6: Mock Data

#### Generators (`packages/data/`)

- 128 trains (49 Kinki + 79 Alstom)
- 10 years of PM tasks (~60k tasks)
- Pre-defined scenarios: "Without adjustment" vs "With adjustment"
- Intentional capacity conflicts for demo

---

### Phase 7: Polish

- Smooth zoom transitions
- Hover effects
- Loading states
- Dark theme consistency

toolUseResult.content:
# MMS Beta - What-If Demo

**Source of Truth:** `./deck/docs/RFQ.md`

Create a high-fidelity demo in `./beta` implementing the "what-if" scenario from the RFQ with mocked data. Canvas Semantic Zoom (Google Maps style) + interactive man-hours vs capacity simulations.

---

## Project Structure

```
./beta/
├── apps/
│   └── demo/                    # Main demo application
├── packages/
│   ├── stores/                  # Vanilla stores + useSyncExternalStore
│   ├── entity-store/            # TypedArray SoA storage + fork/diff
│   ├── spatial/                 # RBush spatial index
│   ├── ui/                      # Design system
│   └── data/                    # Mock data generators
├── docs/
│   └── STREETSCAPE_PATTERNS.md  # TimeScrubber patterns analysis
├── CLAUDE.md                    # Harness
├── features.json                # Feature tracking
├── claude-progress.txt          # Session history
└── init.sh                      # Init script
```

---

## Tech Stack

| Layer | Technology | Justification |
|-------|------------|---------------|
| Runtime | Bun 1.2+ | Fast monorepo |
| Build | Vite 5.x | Fast HMR |
| Frontend | React 18 | Required for BlueprintJS |
| Visualization | deck.gl 9.x | GPU-accelerated, LOD |
| State | Vanilla Store + useSyncExternalStore | Official React 18 pattern |
| Entity Data | EntityStore + SandboxStore | TypedArrays + fork/diff |
| Spatial Index | RBush | R-tree for 60k+ items |
| UI | BlueprintJS 6 | Enterprise dark theme |
| Charts | Visx | d3-based charts |
| Styling | Tailwind CSS | Utility-first |

---

## Design Inspirations

| Aspect | Reference |
|--------|-----------|
| Interaction | AVS/streetscape.gl |
| Timeline | Linear.app milestones |
| Scheduling | Dime Scheduler |
| Visual | IntelliJ Islands |

---

## Implementation Phases

### Phase 0: Harness Setup

Create harness structure for context persistence.

**Files:**
- `./beta/CLAUDE.md`
- `./beta/features.json`
- `./beta/claude-progress.txt`
- `./beta/init.sh`
- `./beta/.claude/settings.json`

---

### Phase 1: Stores + Streetscape Analysis

#### 1.1 Vanilla Stores (`packages/stores/`)

```typescript
// Pattern: Vanilla class + useSyncExternalStore
class ViewportStore {
  private state = { zoom: 1, pan: { x: 0, y: 0 } };
  private listeners = new Set<() => void>();

  getState = () => this.state;
  subscribe = (l: () => void) => { this.listeners.add(l); return () => this.listeners.delete(l); };

  setZoom = (zoom: number) => { this.state = { ...this.state, zoom }; this.listeners.forEach(l => l()); };
}

export const viewportStore = new ViewportStore();
export const useViewport = () => useSyncExternalStore(viewportStore.subscribe, viewportStore.getState);
```

**Stores to create:**
- `viewport.ts` - Zoom, pan, LOD
- `selection.ts` - Hover, selected tasks
- `sandbox.ts` - Live/What-If mode
- `ui.ts` - Panels, modals

#### 1.2 Streetscape.gl Analysis

Analyze https://github.com/uber/streetscape.gl for:
- PlaybackControl patterns
- StreamSettingsPanel patterns
- Document in `docs/STREETSCAPE_PATTERNS.md`

---

### Phase 2: EntityStore + SandboxStore

#### 2.1 Port EntityStore (`packages/entity-store/`)

**From:** `./deck/apps/canvas/src/entity-store/`

- `EntityStore.ts` - TypedArray SoA storage
- `types.ts` - TaskArrays, TaskCursor

#### 2.2 Create SandboxStore (NEW)

```typescript
interface ChangeSet {
  added: number[];
  removed: number[];
  modified: Array<{ index: number; field: string; oldValue: number; newValue: number; }>;
}

class SandboxStore {
  private baseline: EntityStore;
  private sandbox: EntityStore | null = null;

  get isInSandbox() { return this.sandbox !== null; }
  get activeStore() { return this.sandbox ?? this.baseline; }

  fork(): void;      // Create shallow copy
  diff(): ChangeSet; // Compute changes
  apply(): void;     // Commit changes
  discard(): void;   // Abandon changes
}
```

---

### Phase 3: Spatial Index + Canvas

#### 3.1 Port RBushSpatialIndex (`packages/spatial/`)

**From:** `./deck/apps/canvas/src/deck/spatial/`

- `RBushSpatialIndex.ts` - R-tree queries
- `types.ts` - ViewportBounds, SpatialItem

#### 3.2 Canvas Setup (`apps/demo/src/canvas/`)

- `DeckCanvas.tsx` - deck.gl wrapper
- `layers/MacroLayer.ts` - Heatmap (zoom < 0.5x)
- `layers/MesoLayer.ts` - Blocks (0.5x - 2x)
- `layers/MicroLayer.ts` - Details (> 2x)

---

### Phase 4: Design System + UI

#### 4.1 Design Tokens (`packages/ui/`)

```css
--bg-canvas: #0f0f0f;
--bg-panel: #1a1a1a;
--bg-elevated: #242424;
--text-primary: #ffffff;
--text-secondary: #a0a0a0;
--accent-primary: #5c7cfa;
--accent-sandbox: #be4bdb;
--font-sans: 'Inter', system-ui, sans-serif;
```

#### 4.2 Components

- Panel, TimelineRuler, ResourceBar, SandboxToggle

#### 4.3 TimeScrubber

Based on Streetscape.gl analysis from Phase 1.

---

### Phase 5: What-If Mode

#### 5.1 Flow

```
1. User clicks "Enter What-If Mode"
2. sandboxStore.fork()
3. User edits tasks (drag, resize)
4. UI shows diff in real-time
5. User clicks "Apply" → sandboxStore.apply()
   OR "Discard" → sandboxStore.discard()
```

#### 5.2 Components

- `SandboxToggle.tsx` - Live/What-If toggle
- `ImpactPanel.tsx` - Show diff, Apply/Discard buttons
- `ComparisonChart.tsx` - Man-hours vs capacity (RFQ Page 4 style)

---

### Phase 6: Mock Data

#### Generators (`packages/data/`)

- 128 trains (49 Kinki + 79 Alstom)
- 10 years of PM tasks (~60k tasks)
- Pre-defined scenarios: "Without adjustment" vs "With adjustment"
- Intentional capacity conflicts for demo

---

### Phase 7: Polish

- Smooth zoom transitions
- Hover effects
- Loading states
- Dark theme consistency

---

## Layout

```
┌──────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────┐
│ NAVBAR  [Live ◉] [What-If ○]     [Today]  [Zoom: Month ▼]  [⚙]  │
├──────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────┤
│          │                                                       │
│  SIDEBAR │                  CANVAS (deck.gl)                     │
│          │   ┌─────────────────────────────────────────────┐    │
│  Fleet   │   │ Timeline Ruler (Year/Quarter/Month)          │    │
│  Filter  │   ├─────────────────────────────────────────────┤    │
│          │   │ Train 001 ▓▓▓░░░▓▓░░▓▓▓▓░░░░░░▓▓▓░░░░░    │    │
│  Train   │   │ Train 002 ░░▓▓▓░░░░▓▓░░░░▓▓▓░░░░░░░░░░    │    │
│  List    │   │ ...                                          │    │
│          │   └─────────────────────────────────────────────┘    │
│          ├───────────────────────────────────────────────────────┤
│          │                  RESOURCE PANEL                       │
│          │   Man-Hours: [████████░░░░░░░░░░░░░] 65%              │
│          │   ⚠ Week 12: Over capacity by 45 man-hours            │
└──────────┴───────────────────────────────────────────────────────┘
```

---

## Features Tracking

```json
{
  "features": [
    { "id": "HARNESS-001", "phase": 0, "description": "Harness setup" },
    { "id": "STORES-001", "phase": 1, "description": "Vanilla stores" },

---

## Dependencies Graph

    │

# MMS Beta - What-If Demo with Impressive Design

> **PLAN CORRECTION (2025-12-20):** Simplified Architecture & Performance Priority
> - NO custom toolkit - use Vanilla Stores + useSyncExternalStore (React 18 official pattern)
> - EntityStore with fork/diff is PREREQUISITE for What-If (Phase 2)
> - RBush is STRUCTURAL for Canvas, not polish (Phase 3)
> - Streetscape.gl analysis is EXPLICIT TASK (Phase 1)

## Executive Summary

Create a high-fidelity demo in `./beta` for MMS (Mileage Management System) implementing the "what-if" scenario from the RFQ with mocked data. The demo must impress the client with Canvas Semantic Zoom visualization (Google Maps style) + interactive man-hours vs capacity simulations.

**Source of Truth:** `./deck/docs/RFQ.md`

---

## Project Architecture

### Tech Stack

```
./beta/
├── apps/
│   └── demo/                    # Main demo application
├── packages/
│   ├── stores/                  # ✅ NEW: Vanilla stores + useSyncExternalStore
│   │   ├── viewport.ts          # Zoom, pan, LOD state
│   │   ├── selection.ts         # Hover, selected tasks
│   │   ├── sandbox.ts           # What-If mode state
│   │   └── ui.ts                # Panels, modals state
│   ├── entity-store/            # ⚠️ PORTED + EXTENDED with fork/diff
│   │   ├── EntityStore.ts       # TypedArray SoA storage
│   │   ├── SandboxStore.ts      # ⚠️ NEW: fork/diff for What-If
│   │   └── types.ts             # TaskArrays, TaskCursor, etc
│   ├── spatial/                 # ⚠️ PORTED - RBush spatial index
│   │   └── RBushSpatialIndex.ts # R-tree for O(log n) queries
│   ├── ui/                      # Design system (tokens, components)
│   └── data/                    # Mock data generators
├── CLAUDE.md                    # Main harness
├── features.json                # Features with status (JSON)
├── claude-progress.txt          # Session history
├── init.sh                      # Init script
└── .claude/
    └── hooks/                   # Claude Code hooks
```

### Core Technologies

| Layer | Technology | Justification |
|-------|------------|---------------|
| Runtime | Bun 1.2+ | Fast monorepo, native scripts |
| Build | Vite 5.x | Fast HMR, native ESM |
| Frontend | React 18 | Required for BlueprintJS |
| Visualization | deck.gl 9.x | GPU-accelerated, native LOD |
| **State** | **Vanilla Store + useSyncExternalStore** | **Official React pattern, zero extra deps** |
| **Entity Data** | **EntityStore + SandboxStore** | **TypedArrays + fork/diff for What-If** |
| **Spatial Index** | **RBush** | **R-tree for 60k+ items** |
| UI Base | BlueprintJS 6 | Enterprise-grade, dark theme |
| Charts | Visx (d3-based) | Man-hours vs capacity charts |
| Styling | Tailwind CSS | Utility-first, customizable |

### State Management Pattern (NO custom toolkit)

```typescript
/**
 * Vanilla Store Pattern + useSyncExternalStore
 *
 * - Zero dependencies (React 18+ only)
 * - Official React pattern (not third-party library)
 * - Avoids complex custom hooks
 * - Guaranteed performance (optimized subscriptions)
 */

// 1. Vanilla store (simple class)
class ViewportStore {
  private state: ViewportState = { zoom: 1, pan: { x: 0, y: 0 } };
  private listeners = new Set<() => void>();

  getState = () => this.state;

  subscribe = (listener: () => void) => {
    this.listeners.add(listener);
    return () => this.listeners.delete(listener);
  };

  // Actions (methods that mutate state)
  setZoom = (zoom: number) => {
    this.state = { ...this.state, zoom };
    this.listeners.forEach(l => l());
  };

  setPan = (pan: { x: number; y: number }) => {
    this.state = { ...this.state, pan };
    this.listeners.forEach(l => l());
  };
}

// 2. Singleton instance
export const viewportStore = new ViewportStore();

// 3. Hook using useSyncExternalStore (only hook needed)
export function useViewport() {
  return useSyncExternalStore(
    viewportStore.subscribe,
    viewportStore.getState
  );
}

// 4. Selector for specific values (avoids re-renders)
export function useZoom() {
  return useSyncExternalStore(
    viewportStore.subscribe,
    () => viewportStore.getState().zoom
  );
}
```

**Advantages over custom toolkit:**
- Predictable and debuggable code
- No complex abstractions (Machine, Slices, Cache)
- Official React 18+ pattern
- Zero extra dependencies
- Easy to test

### Design Inspirations

| Aspect | Reference | Application |
|--------|-----------|-------------|
| **Interaction** | AVS/streetscape.gl | Temporal playback, streaming-like |
| **Timeline** | Linear.app milestones | Diamonds, zoom Year/Quarter/Month |
| **Scheduling** | Dime Scheduler | Drag-drop, planning board |
| **Visual** | IntelliJ Islands | Dark theme, generous spacing |
| **Data Viz** | Kepler.gl | Layers with temporal filters |

---

## Critical Components

### 1. Vanilla Stores (CREATE FROM SCRATCH)

**DO NOT port @mms/toolkit** - too complex. Create simple vanilla stores:

| Store | Responsibility | Pattern |
|-------|----------------|---------|
| `ViewportStore` | Zoom, pan, LOD level | Vanilla + useSyncExternalStore |
| `SelectionStore` | Selected tasks, hover | Vanilla + useSyncExternalStore |
| `SandboxStore` | Live/What-If mode, fork/diff | EntityStore wrapper |
| `UIStore` | Sidebar, panels, modals | Vanilla + useSyncExternalStore |

**Location:** `./beta/packages/stores/`

```
packages/stores/
├── src/
│   ├── viewport.ts      # ViewportStore
│   ├── selection.ts     # SelectionStore
│   ├── sandbox.ts       # SandboxStore (integrates EntityStore)
│   ├── ui.ts            # UIStore
│   ├── utils.ts         # createStore helper
│   └── index.ts
└── package.json         # @mms/stores
```

### 2. EntityStore (PORT + EXTENSION)
**Origin:** `./deck/apps/canvas/src/entity-store/`

High-performance store with TypedArrays (Structure of Arrays):

| Feature | Status | Crítico para |
|---------|--------|--------------|
| TypedArrays (Float32, Uint16, etc) | ✅ Existe | Performance 60fps |
| Cursor-based access | ✅ Existe | Zero GC |
| Bulk load | ✅ Existe | 100k entities |
| **fork()** | ❌ NÃO EXISTE | What-If mode |
| **diff()** | ❌ NÃO EXISTE | Impact analysis |
| **apply()** | ❌ NÃO EXISTE | Commit changes |

**NOVO: SandboxStore** - Wrapper que adiciona:
```typescript
class SandboxStore {
  private baseline: EntityStore;
  private sandbox: EntityStore | null = null;

  fork(): void {
    // Cria cópia shallow dos TypedArrays
    this.sandbox = this.baseline.clone();
  }

  diff(): ChangeSet {
    // Compara sandbox vs baseline
    return computeDiff(this.baseline, this.sandbox);
  }

  apply(): void {
    // Copia sandbox para baseline
    this.baseline = this.sandbox;
    this.sandbox = null;
  }

  discard(): void {
    this.sandbox = null;
  }
}
```

### 3. RBushSpatialIndex (OBRIGATÓRIO)
**Origem:** `./deck/apps/canvas/src/deck/spatial/`

Indexação espacial para queries O(log n):

| Feature | Uso |
|---------|-----|
| `bulkLoad(tasks)` | Construção inicial do R-tree |
| `queryViewport(bounds)` | Retorna IDs visíveis |
| `getVisibleTasks(bounds)` | Retorna tasks para render |

**Sem RBush, o canvas TRAVA com 60k items.**

---

## Fases de Implementação (CORRIGIDAS)

### FASE 0: Harness Setup (CRÍTICO)

**Objetivo:** Criar estrutura de harness que persiste contexto entre sessões.

#### Arquivos do Harness

#### Tarefas

   - Copiar estrutura de `./deck/CLAUDE.md`

2. **Criar `./beta/features.json`**

   - Incluir: passes, blockedBy, tasks

3. **Criar `./beta/claude-progress.txt`**
   - Template inicial vazio

4. **Criar `./beta/init.sh`**

   #!/bin/bash
   bun --version || (echo "Bun not installed" && exit 1)
   bun install
   echo "✅ Environment ready"
   ```

5. **Configurar Claude Code Hooks**
   - Hook `UserPromptSubmit`: Verificar se progress.txt está atualizado
   - Hook `Stop`: Lembrar de commitar e atualizar harness

---

### FASE 1: Toolkit Core + Streetscape Analysis (FUNDAÇÃO)

**Objetivo:** Portar a engine de state management que permite rodar sem React hooks.

#### 1.1 Portar @mms/toolkit

packages/toolkit/
├── src/

### FASE 2: EntityStore + SandboxStore (PRÉ-REQUISITO WHAT-IF)

**Objetivo:** Portar EntityStore e IMPLEMENTAR fork/diff para What-If.

#### 2.1 Portar EntityStore

**Origem:** `./deck/apps/canvas/src/entity-store/`
**Destino:** `./beta/packages/entity-store/`

Arquivos a portar:
```
packages/entity-store/
├── src/

#### 2.2 IMPLEMENTAR SandboxStore (NOVO)

**Arquivo:** `./beta/packages/entity-store/src/SandboxStore.ts`

```typescript
/**
 * SandboxStore - Enables What-If scenarios with fork/diff
 *
 * Architecture:
 * - baseline: EntityStore (read-only during sandbox)
 * - sandbox: EntityStore | null (writable copy)
 *
 * Operations:
 * - fork(): Creates shallow copy of TypedArrays
 * - diff(): Computes ChangeSet between baseline and sandbox
 * - apply(): Commits sandbox to baseline
 * - discard(): Abandons sandbox changes
 */

interface ChangeSet {
  added: number[];      // Indices of new tasks
  removed: number[];    // Indices of deleted tasks
  modified: Array<{
    index: number;
    field: keyof TaskArrays;
    oldValue: number;
    newValue: number;
  }>;
}

class SandboxStore {
  private baseline: EntityStore;
  private sandbox: EntityStore | null = null;

  get isInSandbox(): boolean {
    return this.sandbox !== null;
  }

  get activeStore(): EntityStore {
    return this.sandbox ?? this.baseline;
  }

  fork(): void;
  diff(): ChangeSet;
  apply(): void;
  discard(): void;
}
```

---

### FASE 3: Canvas + Spatial Index (ESTRUTURAL)

**Objetivo:** Canvas deck.gl funcional com indexação espacial para 60k+ items.

#### 3.1 Portar RBushSpatialIndex

**Origem:** `./deck/apps/canvas/src/deck/spatial/`
**Destino:** `./beta/packages/spatial/`

```
packages/spatial/
├── src/

│   ├── types.ts              # ViewportBounds, SpatialItem

```

```
apps/demo/src/canvas/
├── DeckCanvas.tsx           # Wrapper deck.gl
├── layers/

│   ├── MesoLayer.ts         # Blocks (0.5x - 2x)
│   └── MicroLayer.ts        # Details (> 2x)
├── viewport/
│   └── ViewportController.ts # Pan, zoom, LOD
└── index.ts
```

#### 3.3 Integração RBush + deck.gl

```typescript
// DeckCanvas.tsx
const visibleTaskIds = useMemo(() => {
  return spatialIndex.queryViewport(viewportBounds);
}, [viewportBounds]);

const layers = useMemo(() => {
  const tasks = spatialIndex.getTasksByIds(visibleTaskIds);
  return createLODLayers(tasks, zoomLevel);
}, [visibleTaskIds, zoomLevel]);
```

**Sem esta fase, o canvas não funciona com dados reais (60k items).**

### FASE 5: What-If Mode (USA SandboxStore)

**Objetivo:** Implementar simulação interativa usando SandboxStore.fork/diff.

#### 5.1 Integração SandboxStore + UI

```typescript
// Fluxo What-If
1. User clicks "Enter What-If Mode"
2. sandboxStore.fork() → cria cópia dos dados
3. User edita tarefas (drag, resize, delete)
4. Cada edição modifica sandboxStore.activeStore
5. UI mostra diff em tempo real: sandboxStore.diff()
6. User clicks "Apply" → sandboxStore.apply()
   OU User clicks "Discard" → sandboxStore.discard()
```

│ [Apply Changes]  [Discard]          │
└─────────────────────────────────────┘

#### Layers deck.gl

1. **HeatmapLayer** (zoom < 0.5x) - Density de tarefas
2. **ScatterplotLayer** (0.5x - 2x) - Blocos de manutenção
3. **TextLayer** (> 2x) - Detalhes de tarefas
4. **PathLayer** - Linhas de dependência
5. **IconLayer** - Milestones (diamantes)

#### Interações

- **Pan**: Arrastar para navegar no tempo
- **Zoom**: Scroll para mudar granularidade (Year → Month → Week)
- **Hover**: Tooltip com detalhes da tarefa
- **Click**: Selecionar tarefa para edição (modo What-If)
- **Drag** (What-If): Mover tarefa para nova data

Here are the search results for deck.gl performance best practices with 100k elements:

## Key Findings

### General Performance Expectations
On 2015 MacBook Pros with dual graphics cards, most basic layers (like ScatterplotLayer) render fluidly at 60 FPS during pan and zoom operations up to about 1M (one million) data items, with framerates dropping into low double digits (10-20FPS) when data sets approach 10M items.

### Relevant GitHub Discussions

1. **[Strategy to performant display more than 100K items](https://github.com/visgl/deck.gl/discussions/7076)** - A discussion about using deck.gl 8.7.11 with react-map-gl to display more than 100K items in one layer, where the layer updates itself several times a second.

2. **[Performance best practices for frequent data updates](https://github.com/visgl/deck.gl/discussions/6869)** - A discussion about bottlenecks encountered when working with deck.gl, focusing on frequent data updates with static and realtime datasets.

3. **[Real time updates performance best practices](https://github.com/visgl/deck.gl/discussions/8283)** - A discussion about performance issues when regularly updating a data layer representing vehicle positions on a map in React with Deck.GL.

4. **[Single vs Multiple Deck Instances](https://github.com/visgl/deck.gl/discussions/7412)** - A discussion about best practices regarding the number of Deck instances when using DeckGL with React.

5. **[Hidden Layers Performance](https://github.com/visgl/deck.gl/discussions/7021)** - A reported case of performance degradation in a map with 645 layers where only 12 are visible.

### Official Resources
- **[Performance Optimization Guide](https://deck.gl/docs/developer-guide/performance)** - The official deck.gl documentation on performance optimization
- deck.gl is designed to simplify high-performance, WebGPU/WebGL2 based visualization of large data sets, allowing users to get impressive visual results with minimal effort by composing existing layers.

I recommend checking the GitHub discussions (especially #7076 about 100K+ items) and the official performance documentation for detailed strategies and code examples.
